text: Fatima complained of the suffering caused to her by the hand mill. Some Captives were brought to the Prophet, she came 1o him but did not find him at home Aisha was present there 1o whom she told (of her desire for a servant). When the Prophet (%) came, Aisha informed him about Fatima's visit. “Ali added "So the Prophet (%) came to us, while we had gone to our bed | wanted to get up but the Prophet (%) said, *Remain at your place". Then he sat down between us fill | found the coolness of his feet on my chest. Then he said, *Shall | teach you a thing which is better than what you have asked me? When you go to bed, say, ‘Allahu-Akbar' thirty- four ftimes, and 'Subhan Allah thirty-three fimes, and ‘Al hamduli Lah thirty-three times for that is better for you both than a servant." Reference - Sahih al-Bukhari 3705
